title: Auth token key rotation lag
description: New JWT signing key was rotated, but one auth pod still serves stale keys.

logs.message: JWKS refresh failed: timeout fetching new key set from issuer
Token validation failed: stale JWKS cache still using old key id

alerts.message: auth-service using stale JWKS cache after key rotation

ground_truth.correct_fix: Force a JWKS cache refresh on the stale auth-service pod by invalidating the cache and restarting the pod. Reduce the JWKS cache TTL so keys are fetched more frequently after rotations. Add a background refresh job that proactively fetches new keys instead of waiting for cache expiry. Monitor for signature mismatch errors after future key rotations.
